name: Fettuccine and Chicken
recipeIngredient: 4 boneless, skinless chicken breast halves cut into 1/2-inch strips
10 oz Diced Tomatoes and Green Chilies (ROTEL)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a gallon-sized food storage bag, combine olive oil, lime juice, and crushed red pepper.
2. Add chicken strips; seal the bag and shake well to coat the chicken evenly.
3. Refrigerate the mixture for 15 minutes.
4. Remove the chicken and discard the marinade.
5. Spray a large skillet with PAM.
6. Add chicken and garlic to the skillet, cooking until nearly done.
7. Add diced tomatoes with green chilies; bring to a boil.
8. Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes, or until the chicken is fully cooked.
9. Meanwhile, cook fettuccini according to package directions, then drain.
10. Add butter and lime rind to the pasta, tossing well and keeping warm.
11. Arrange fettuccini on a platter; top with chicken and diced tomatoes sauce.
12. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese, if desired.
